steps.title: Bracket the inserted definition
steps.content: The words after the first comma define photosynthesis between the subject Photosynthesis and the verb is fueled. That inserted definition needs a closing comma after nutrients.

steps.title: Choose matching punctuation
steps.content: Choice A leaves the definition open, Choice B adds an unneeded and, and Choice D uses a dash that does not match the opening comma. The comma after nutrients closes the nonessential definition. The answer is C.
